description_long: This is a vintage, single-propeller monoplane with a wooden frame and fabric-covered wings, reminiscent of early 20th-century aircraft. The fuselage is painted a light green, while the wings and tail surfaces are tan with black and white cross insignias, suggesting a historical military or training use. The wings are straight and mounted at a mid-level on the fuselage, with visible struts and rigging wires for structural support. The engine is mounted at the nose, exposed above the fuselage, and drives a wooden propeller. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the engine, with a small windshield and a single seat visible. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a tail skid, typical of early taildragger configurations.
description: A vintage, single-propeller monoplane with green fuselage, tan fabric wings, and black-and-white cross insignias, featuring an open cockpit and exposed nose engine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green fuselage, tan wings with cross insignias, exposed nose engine, and wooden propeller.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the straight wingspan, open cockpit behind the engine, and symmetrical wing insignias.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail structure, rigging wires, and the same wing and fuselage details as the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail assembly, tail skid, and the tapering fuselage with visible rigging.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing monoplane with straight, fabric-covered wings and no winglets; supported by external struts and rigging wires.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with exposed cylinder heads and a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers; features a tail skid.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a fixed tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit located just behind the engine, configured for a single seat with a small windshield.
